# Projects

Project Portfolio
Aaryan Patel | Future Tech Entrepreneur
Web Development & AI Integration
I have spent significant time experimenting with the intersection of artificial intelligence and web development. By leveraging AI as a collaborative tool, I have conceptualized and deployed multiple websites, focusing on clean design and functional code. This process has allowed me to master the art of prompt engineering and rapid prototyping, giving me the ability to build and refine digital assets quickly. My goal with these projects is to create efficient, low-maintenance systems that provide value while maintaining a professional user experience.

Game Design & Technical Scripting
My background in game development is rooted in a deep exploration of Roblox Studio and the Lua programming language. I have developed several interactive environments, including complex 100-level obstacle courses that required intricate backend scripting. Through this work, I engineered systems for checkpoints, player data tracking, and progressive difficulty scaling. This experience was vital in sharpening my technical troubleshooting skills, as I had to constantly debug code and iterate on game mechanics to ensure a seamless experience for the players.

Academic Leadership & Public Speaking
Beyond technical development, I am highly committed to personal growth and leadership. I recently completed a specialized Harvard University course focused on leadership, which provided me with a strategic framework for managing teams and making high-level business decisions. I put these communication skills into practice by delivering a keynote address to an audience of over 300 people at a school-wide assembly. Speaking in front of a large crowd helped me refine my ability to stay calm under pressure and clearly articulate complex ideas, which is a core skill I plan to carry into my future business ventures.

My Entrepreneurial Philosophy
I believe that the best way to prepare for a career in business is through constant experimentation and a "learn by doing" mindset. Every project I take on—whether it is a new script, a website, or a public speaking engagement—is a building block toward my ultimate goal of becoming an entrepreneur. I am driven by a passion for mathematics and logic, and I am always looking for new ways to bridge the gap between technical hobbies and professional-grade business solutions.
